enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a casual morning vlog update from Boulder, talking about oversleeping after a late work night, getting a haircut and lunch with his mom, and his ongoing project of tracing buildings in Rome while listening to Mike Duncan's history podcast. He also shows off some weed and keef he recently acquired and mentions an upcoming request video.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Frustrated with himself for missing the chance to reset to a daytime schedule
Highly recommends it; using it as an audio companion to his Rome mapping project
Enthusiastic; describes keef as giving a notably intense high
